good_example_nd.sv

Company: IC Verimeter

Author: icshun[xxx]t.help@gmai[xxx]l.com

Date: 2026-03-29

Description: End-to-end NaturalDocs example on SystemVerilog and UVM (documentation / training).

SystemVerilog + UVM + NaturalDocs Example
Overview

End-to-end example showing NaturalDocs comments attached to SystemVerilog and UVM constructs.

License

This file is for documentation and training purposes.

Includes and Imports

Bring in UVM and shared package definitions.

timescale
`timescale 1ns/1ps
View source

Timescale directive.

uvm_macros.​svh
`include "uvm_macros.svh"
View source

Makes UVM factory and reporting macros available.

svnd_example_pkg
package svnd_example_pkg
View source

Shared typedefs, enums, structs, unions, and utility tasks/functions.

Variables
DefaultTimeout
localparam time DefaultTimeout = 100ns
View source

Default timeout used in testbench waits.

Types
data_t
typedef logic [31:0] data_t
View source

Common 32-bit data type.

op_e
typedef enum logic [1:0] {
OP_IDLE,
OP_READ,
OP_WRITE
} op_e
View source

Simple transaction operation enumeration.

txn_t
typedef struct packed {
logic 
[31:0] 
addr;
data_t 
data;
op_e 
op;
} txn_t
View source

Packed transaction payload.

Unions
raw_data_t
typedef union packed {
logic 
[31:0] 
word;
logic [3:0]
[7:0] 
bytes;
} raw_data_t
View source

Union representing data as either a 32-bit word or an array of 4 bytes.

Variables
txn_done_ev
event txn_done_ev
View source

Event triggered when a transaction completes.

Macros
SVND_LOG
`define SVND_LOG(
ID,
MSG
) \
View source

Simple logging macro wrapping `uvm_info`.

Functions
parity
function automatic logic parity (
input 
data_t 
value
)
View source

Compute XOR parity of a data word.

wait_cycles
task automatic wait_cycles (
input 
int 
cycles,
ref 
logic 
clk
)
View source

Wait for a fixed number of rising clock edges.

bus_if
interface
bus_if ( input logic clk, input logic rst_n )
View source

Simple bus interface with clocking, modports, properties, and covergroups.

Variables
addr
logic [31:0] addr
View source

Address bus.

data
logic [31:0] data
View source

Data bus.

valid
logic valid
View source

Indicates a valid transfer.

ready
logic ready
View source

Ready handshake from slave.

cb
clocking cb @(
posedge 
clk
)
View source

Clocking block for cycle-accurate access.

source_mp
modport source_mp (
import 
cb,
output 
addr,
data,
valid,
input 
ready
)
View source

Master-side view of the bus.

sink_mp
modport sink_mp (
import 
cb,
input 
addr,
data,
valid,
output 
ready
)
View source

Slave-side view of the bus.

Functions
addr_alignment_chk
checker addr_alignment_chk (
input 
logic 
clk,
input 
logic 
rst_n,
input logic 
[31:0] 
addr
)
View source

Checker block for verifying address alignment rules.

word_aligned_p
property word_aligned_p
View source

Property ensuring the address is always word-aligned.

assume_word_aligned_p
assume property (
assume_word_aligned_p
)
View source

Assume the property holds for formal verification.

valid_ready_handshake_p
property valid_ready_handshake_p
View source

Once valid is asserted it must be followed by ready within 4 cycles.

back_to_back_valid_s
sequence back_to_back_valid_s
View source

Sequence of two consecutive valid cycles.

Coverage
cg_bus
covergroup cg_bus @(
posedge 
clk
)
View source

Cover basic bus behavior.

valid
coverpoint valid
View source

Cover when valid is asserted.

ready
coverpoint ready
View source

Cover when ready is asserted.

valid, ready
cross valid, ready
View source

Cover all valid/ready combinations.

Variables
bus_cg
cg_bus bus_cg = new()
View source

Instantiate covergroup.

Module DUT
dut
module dut #(
parameter 
int 
WIDTH
 = 
32
)
(
input 
logic
clk,
input 
logic
rst_n,
input 
logic
 [31:0] 
addr,
input 
logic
 [WIDTH-1:0] 
data_in,
output 
logic
 [WIDTH-1:0] 
data_out,
output 
logic
ready
)
View source

Simple DUT showing procedural, continuous, generate, and assertion constructs.

svnd_example_pkg
import svnd_example_pkg::*
View source

Use shared types and utilities.

Variables
state
state_e state
View source

Simple FSM state.

next_state
state_e next_state
View source

Next state logic.

reg_data
logic [WIDTH-1:0] reg_data
View source

Internal registered data.

Assignments
ready
assign ready = (
state
 = 
= DONE
)
View source

Continuous assignment to drive ready.

Processes
initial
initial begin state = IDLE; next_state = IDLE; reg_data = '0;
View source

Initial block for reset initialization.

final
final begin $display(
"
DUT final block reached at time %0t",
$
time
);
View source

Final block for end-of-simulation reporting.

always_comb
always_comb begin next_state = state;
View source

Combinational next-state logic.

case
unique case (
state
) IDLE: begin if (addr != 32'h0) begin next_state = BUSY;
View source

Use unique case on state.

always_ff
always_ff @(
posedge clk or 
negedge 
rst_n
) begin if (!rst_n) begin state <= IDLE; reg_data <= '0;
View source

Sequential logic with async reset.

always_latch
always_latch begin if (
!
rst_n
) data_out <= '0; else if (state == DONE) data_out <= reg_data;
View source

Simple latch example using always_latch.

always
always @(
addr 
or 
data_in
) begin assert (addr[1:0] == 2'b00) else $warning("Unaligned address %h", addr);
View source

Generic always block for miscellaneous logic.

Package svnd_uvm_pkg
svnd_uvm_pkg
package svnd_uvm_pkg
View source

UVM components using SystemVerilog OOP features.

uvm_pkg
import uvm_pkg::*
View source

Standard UVM package.

svnd_example_pkg
import svnd_example_pkg::*
View source

Shared transaction types.

Class svnd_transaction

Class: svnd_transaction UVM sequence item representing a bus transaction.

Variables
m_addr
rand logic [31:0] m_addr
View source

Transaction m_address.

m_data
rand data_t m_data
View source

Transaction m_data.

m_op
rand op_e m_op
View source

Transaction operation.

m_id
randc logic [7:0] m_id
View source

Cyclic random transaction ID.

Constraints
addr_align_c
constraint addr_align_c {
addr[1:0]
 = 
= 2'b00;
}
View source

Keep addresses word aligned.

Functions
new
function new(
string 
name
 = 
"svnd_transaction"
)
View source

Object constructor.

do_copy
function void do_copy(
uvm_object 
rhs
)
View source

Standard UVM copy implementation.

convert2string
function string convert2string()
View source

Human-readable representation.

Class svnd_driver
svnd_driver
uvm_driver #(svnd_transaction)
svnd_driver
View source

Simple UVM driver using a virtual interface.

svnd_driver
)

Variables
vif
virtual bus_if.master_mp_vif vif

Functions
new
function new(
string 
name,
uvm_component 
parent
)
View source
run_phase
task run_phase(
uvm_phase 
phase
)
View source

Main driver loop.

drive_txn
task automatic drive_txn(
svnd_transaction 
tr
)
View source

Drive a single transaction on the bus.

Class svnd_env
svnd_env
uvm_env
svnd_env
View source

UVM environment containing the driver.

Variables
m_driver
svnd_driver m_driver
View source

svnd_env
)

new
function new(
string 
name,
uvm_component 
parent
)

uvm_phase 
phase
)

Module tb_top
tb_top
module tb_top
View source

Top-level testbench module instantiating DUT, interfaces, and starting UVM.

Variables
clk
logic clk
View source

System clock.

rst_n
logic rst_n
View source

Active-low reset.

bus_if_i
bus_if bus_if_i (
.
clk 
(
clk),
.
rst_n(rst_n)
)
View source

Instantiate bus interface.

dut_i
dut #(
.
WIDTH(32)
) dut_i ( .clk (clk), .rst_n (rst_n), .addr (bus_if_i.addr), .data_in (bus_if_i.data), .data_out(), .ready (bus_if_i.ready) )
View source

Instantiate DUT.

align_chk_i
bind dut addr_alignment_chk align_chk_i (
.
clk(clk),
.
rst_n(rst_n),
.
addr(addr)
)
View source

Bind the address alignment checker to the DUT instance.

Programs
test_prog
program automatic test_prog(
bus_if.
master_mp 
m_if
)
View source

Simple test program driving transactions into the sequencer.

Variables
test_prog_i
test_prog test_prog_i(
bus_if_i.master_mp
)
View source

Connect test program to interface.
